top_signals.title: Powell, Acceptance Remarks
top_signals.summary: Speech For the 2026 John F. Kennedy Profile in Courage Award, John F. Kennedy Library Foundation, Boston, Massachusetts
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Jefferson, Global Economic Developments and the U.S. Economy
top_signals.summary: Speech At the 2026 Bank of Japan-Institute for Monetary and Economic Studies Conference, Tokyo, Japan
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Bank of Korea Sees Need to Hike Rate on Higher Inflation, Growth
top_signals.summary: South Korea’s central bank reiterated that policy rates will need to rise at an appropriate time, reinforcing its hawkish stance just a week before policymakers will meet to decide on whether to resume tightening.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Federal Reserve issues initial findings from its 2025 triennial payments study
top_signals.summary: Federal Reserve issues initial findings from its 2025 triennial payments study
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: US Navy fears ballistic missile subs can be hit by drones, anti-tank rockets
top_signals.summary: The U.S. Navy is searching for better methods of protecting its missile subs, as well as the shore installations that support them.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Officials set to revise MiCA to cover non-EU stablecoin issuers: Report
top_signals.summary: EU officials reportedly plan to consider changes to the Markets in Crypto-Assets framework, dubbed by some as “MiCA 2.0,” in response to a US stablecoin law and rules on tokenized payments and deposits.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.summary: Minutes of the Board's discount rate meeting on April 20 and 29, 2026

top_signals.title: Saudi Efforts to Revive Gulf Oil Loadings Run Into Buyer Caution - Bloomberg.com
top_signals.summary: Saudi Efforts to Revive Gulf Oil Loadings Run Into Buyer Caution  Bloomberg.com
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Top South Korea court to decide ex-president’s martial law case
top_signals.summary: The disgraced former president is already in detention while he appeals a separate life sentence for leading an insurrection with his martial law declaration.
